title: ilex decidua var. longipes
intro: Ilex decidua var. longipes, also known as American Holly, is a plant species native to North America, characterized by its glossy, dark green leaves and bright red berries. The plant's leaves and berries have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex decidua var. longipes include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
